title: polygala major var. grandiflora
intro: Polygala major var. grandiflora, also known as the common or greater polygala, is a flowering plant in the milkwort family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and diuretic effects, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Polygala major var. grandiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, Polygala major var. grandiflora is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support respiratory health and overall well-being.
